title: Saudi Meat Stir Fry
description: A flavorful Saudi-inspired stir fry with marinated meat, served with a hint of sweet and savory flavors.
instructions: 1. In a large bowl, whisk together oil, sweet, savory, salt, and black pepper.
2. Add the meat to the marinade and mix until coated.
3. Cover and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes or up to 2 hours.
4. Heat a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
5. Add the onion and cook until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
6. Add the garlic and ginger and cook for 1 minute.
7. Add the marinated meat and cook until browned, about 5-6 minutes.
8. Stir in the stir-fry sauce (if using) and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
9. Serve hot garnished with chopped cilantro or scallions (if desired).
10. Enjoy your delicious Saudi Meat Stir Fry!
